blocks.text: Drake ducks as dirt rains down. He closes his eyes tight. Then the shaking stops. Drake opens his eyes. All the candles have gone out. He looks behind him in the darkness. "Worm, are you all right?"

sentences.text: Drake ducks as dirt rains down.
All the candles have gone out.
He looks behind him in the darkness.

blocks.text: Worm looks fine. In fact, he doesn't have any dust on him. Everybody else is pretty dirty. "Is every body okay?" Drake asks. Ana is on the ground. Bo helps her up. "I'm fine," she says. "That is scary, though!" Rori walks over. "I'm sorry," she says. "I don't know why that weird ball of light makes Vulcan freak out." Drake looks around. "Thankfully, it's gone now." "We should get back," Bo says nervously.

sentences.text: In fact, he doesn't have any dust on him.
"I don't know why that weird ball of light makes Vulcan freak out."
"We should get back," Bo says nervously.

blocks.text: Drake looks past Worm. The tunnel is blocks with rocks and dirt. "I don't think we can," Drake says. "The way outside is blocked, too," Rori says. "We're trap!" says Bo. He turns pale. Ana's dragon makes a sad sound. "It's okay, Kepri," Ana says, stroking Kepri's snout. "Can you give us some light, please?" Kepri opens her mouth and a beautiful, white ball of light comes out. The light hung in the air.

sentences.text: The tunnel is blocks with rocks and dirt.
"I don't think we can," Drake says.
"The way outside is blocked, too," Rori says.
Ana's dragon makes a sad sound.
"It's okay, Kepri," Ana says, stroking Kepri's snout.
"Can you give us some light, please?"
Kepri opens her mouth and a beautiful, white ball of light comes out.
The light hung in the air.

blocks.text: "Vulcan is strong," Rori says. "He should be able to push through the rocks." Vulcan is calmer now that the red orb is gone. He pushes at the rock wall, but the rocks doesn't budge. "Come on, Vulcan!" Rori urges him. But Vulcan cann't break through. Bo speaks up. "I can have Shu blast through the rocks with water" Ana frowns. "What if it doesn't work? Then the tunnel will fill with water." Everybody is quiet. They know Ana is right. They are stuck. Drake looks at Worm. "Sorry I get you into this," he whispers.

sentences.text: "He should be able to push through the rocks."
Vulcan is calmer now that the red orb is gone.
He pushes at the rock wall, but the rocks doesn't budge.
"I can have Shu blast through the rocks with water" Ana frowns.
Then the tunnel will fill with water."
"Sorry I get you into this," he whispers.

blocks.text: Then Worm's green eyes start to glow. A green light sweeps from the top of Worm's head to the end of his tail.

sentences.text: Then Worm's green eyes start to glow.
A green light sweeps from the top of Worm's head to the end of his tail.

blocks.text: Drake jumps back. "Worm?" He feels something warm on his chest. He looks down to see that his Dragon Stone is glowing, too! Ana, Rori, and Bo's mouths drop open. They stare at Worm and Drake. Worm's green glow fills the tunnel. "Drake, it looks like your dragon's going to explode!" Rori yells.
